description: Web UI — Storage status. Add a /storage page (Meta + Data tabs + per-class card) plus a Cluster Overview hero summary and a top-level degraded banner. New /admin/v1/storage/* endpoints back the UI via meta.HealthProbe + data.HealthProbe interfaces (Cassandra peers / TiKV PD stores / RADOS pool stats / S3-over-S3 reachability). Extends the bucketstats sampler with per-(bucket, class) aggregation. Closes ROADMAP P3 'Web UI — Storage status (meta + data backend observability)'. 6 stories.

userStories.title: Meta backend health probe (Cassandra peers / TiKV PD stores / memory)
userStories.description: As a debug-tool author, I want a meta.Store-shaped probe that returns peer / store health so the storage page has data.
acceptanceCriteria: New optional interface internal/meta.HealthProbe: MetaHealth(ctx) (*meta.MetaHealthReport, error) with fields {Backend string, Nodes []NodeStatus, ReplicationFactor int, Warnings []string}; NodeStatus = {Address, State, SchemaVersion, DataCenter, Rack}

Cassandra impl: SELECT peer, data_center, rack, release_version, schema_version FROM system.peers UNION ALL SELECT broadcast_address ... FROM system.local; aggregate schema-version drift into Warnings; LOCAL_ONE consistency with 10s in-process cache

TiKV impl: dedicated thin client internal/meta/tikv/pdclient.go that takes []string PD endpoints, tries them in order with 2s timeout each, returns first non-error; HTTP GET /pd/api/v1/stores parsed into NodeStatus; raft-leader imbalance (any store has 0 leaders while peers have >0) folded into Warnings
Memory impl returns single-node report
storetest contract caseMetaHealth exercises all three backends
Endpoint GET /admin/v1/storage/meta in adminapi returns the report as JSON, JWT-auth + audit middleware (read-only, GET => skipped audit per existing rule)
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Data backend health probe (RADOS pool stats / S3-over-S3 reachability / memory)
userStories.description: As a debug-tool author, I want a data.Backend-shaped probe that returns per-pool stats so the storage page has data.
acceptanceCriteria: New optional interface internal/data.HealthProbe: DataHealth(ctx) (*data.DataHealthReport, error) with fields {Backend string, Pools []PoolStatus, Warnings []string}; PoolStatus = {Name, Class, BytesUsed uint64, ObjectCount uint64, NumReplicas int, State}

RADOS impl: iterate the configured [rados] classes map, call librados.GetPoolStat per pool (kb -> bytes), populate PoolStatus; pull cluster HEALTH_OK/HEALTH_WARN/HEALTH_ERR via librados.MonCommand("status") with summarised JSON parse, cap warnings at 5
S3-over-S3 impl: HEAD on the configured backend bucket, returns one PoolStatus with Name=<backend bucket>, Class=<all classes mapped>, BytesUsed=0/ObjectCount=0 (document gap), State=reachable|error
Memory impl returns one PoolStatus with size=process-RSS proxy
Endpoint GET /admin/v1/storage/data in adminapi returns the report as JSON
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Per-storage-class breakdown via bucketstats sampler
userStories.description: As an operator, I want bytes + object count per storage class so I can see which class is consuming the most space.
acceptanceCriteria: Extend the existing bucketstats.Sampler (already per-shard from Phase 3 US-012) to ALSO emit per-(bucket, class) aggregates
New gauges strata_storage_class_bytes + strata_storage_class_objects keyed {class, bucket}

Lockstep meta backends: cassandra reads objects rows aggregated per (bucket_id, storage_class); memory computes from in-process map; tikv scans existing range-scan and groups in-process by o.StorageClass
Cardinality bounded by existing STRATA_BUCKETSTATS_TOPN envvar
Endpoint GET /admin/v1/storage/classes returns {classes: [{class, bytes, objects}], pools_by_class: {class: pool_name}} (the latter from the configured [rados] classes map for UI rendering)
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: /storage page UI (Meta + Data tabs + classes card)
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a single page where I can see meta + data backend health and per-class breakdown.
acceptanceCriteria: New web/src/pages/Storage.tsx + route /storage; lazy-loaded via React.lazy to keep initial bundle <=500 KiB gzipped
Sidebar entry under primary nav (NOT nested under Diagnostics) between Buckets and Consumers; icon lucide HardDrive or Database
Two shadcn Tabs: Meta (default) + Data
Meta tab: header card 'Backend = cassandra / tikv / memory' + table of NodeStatus rows (Address / State / DC / Rack / SchemaVersion); warning banner at top when report.Warnings.length > 0

Data tab: header card 'Backend = rados / s3 / memory' + table of PoolStatus rows (Name / Class / Bytes used / Objects / Replicas / State); below table a 'Storage classes' subsection with bytes-per-class horizontal stacked bar (recharts BarChart, already in bundle) + per-class chip list
TanStack Query 30s polling; refresh button mirrors Consumers/Buckets shape; empty / loading / error states; memory-backend rows render with explainer
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Cluster Overview hero summary + degraded warning banner
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a glance-level storage summary on the home page AND a top-level banner when storage is degraded so I notice problems before navigating.
acceptanceCriteria: Cluster Overview hero (web/src/pages/ClusterOverview.tsx) gains a 'Storage' card: total bytes across all pools + per-class chip strip (e.g., STANDARD: 800 GiB | STANDARD_IA: 400 GiB | GLACIER_IR: 50 GiB); reads from /admin/v1/storage/classes (cached 60 s in TanStack Query)
Hero card cardinality: cap at top-5 classes by bytes; rest collapse into '+N more' link to /storage

New /admin/v1/storage/health aggregate endpoint returns {ok: bool, warnings: []string, source: meta|data}; combines Meta + Data probes; ok=false when either reports Warnings.length > 0 or any node/pool is in non-OK state
Test-only env STRATA_STORAGE_HEALTH_OVERRIDE: when set to a JSON string the handler returns it verbatim; documented in internal/adminapi/storage_health_test.go

New <StorageDegradedBanner> component (web/src/components/StorageDegradedBanner.tsx); polls /admin/v1/storage/health every 30s; visible when ok=false; lists worst 3 warnings + 'View Storage page' link; dismissible per session via sessionStorage flag (re-shows on refresh if still degraded)
Banner position: above AppShell header (sibling above the outermost flex div) so operator sees it on every page
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill (use STRATA_STORAGE_HEALTH_OVERRIDE to simulate degraded state)

userStories.title: Playwright storage.spec.ts + docs + ROADMAP close + cycle merge
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want Playwright e2e + operator docs + ROADMAP closed in one commit at cycle end.
acceptanceCriteria: New web/e2e/storage.spec.ts: storage-page-renders (login -> /storage -> Meta+Data tabs visible, NodeStatus row count >= 1, PoolStatus row count >= 1)
Spec: cluster-hero-shows-storage-card (login -> home -> 'Storage' card visible with at least one class chip)
Spec: degraded-banner-on-warn (CI sets STRATA_STORAGE_HEALTH_OVERRIDE for the e2e job -> assert banner visible above shell + dismiss button works)
CI e2e-ui job adds pnpm exec playwright test storage.spec.ts after existing specs
New docs/storage.md covers env vars per backend, Warnings entry meanings, RADOS HEALTH_WARN interpretation (link to ceph docs), per-class pool mapping
docs/ui.md Capability Matrix gains a row referencing the Storage page
ROADMAP gets ~~**P3 — Web UI — Storage status (meta + data backend observability).**~~ — **Done.** <one-line summary>. (commit `<sha>`) under ## Web UI section

Cycle-end merge: fast-forward / squash-merge ralph/web-ui-storage-status into main, push, archive scripts/ralph/prd.json + scripts/ralph/progress.txt under scripts/ralph/archive/2026-MM-DD-web-ui-storage-status-complete/ via archive_cycle on <promise>COMPLETE</promise>
Markdown PRD tasks/prd-web-ui-storage-status.md is REMOVED in the close-flip commit per CLAUDE.md PRD lifecycle rule (canonical record is the ralph snapshot)
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
